code:
import io
import string
import list

fn is_space(_ c: Int) -> Bool
  c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 10 or c == 13
end

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut current = ""
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(c)
      if is_space(c)
        if not string.is_empty(current)
          match string.parse_int(current)
          when Some(v)
            result = list.push(result, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          current = ""
        end
      else
        current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(c)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(current)
    match string.parse_int(current)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn sort_desc(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  let n = xs.len()
  if n == 0
    xs
  else
    match list.max(xs)
    when Some(m)
      mut rest: List<Int> = []
      mut found = false
      mut i = 0
      while i < n
        match xs.get(i)
        when Some(v)
          if v == m and not found
            found = true
          else
            rest = list.push(rest, v)
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        i = i + 1
      end
      let sorted = sort_desc(rest)
      mut newlist: List<Int> = [m]
      for x in sorted
        newlist = list.push(newlist, x)
      end
      newlist
    when None
      xs
    end
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let nums = parse_ints(line1)
  let k = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  let sorted = sort_desc(nums)
  let n = sorted.len()
  let k_actual = if k > n
    n
  else
    k
  end
  mut out = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < k_actual
    match sorted.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if i == 0
        out = "#{v}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
